requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — SLSB / EWRC Requirement and Tropical Environment Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——SLSB / EWRC要求与热带环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——SLSB / EWRC要求與熱帶環境降額

summary.en: Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB) is the national standards body and adopts IEC publications as national standards in the absence of a specific Sierra Leone standard. For EV charging equipment, IEC 61851-1 (general requirements for conductive EV supply equipment) and IEC 61851-23:2023 (DC EV charging stations) are the applicable IEC baseline. EWRC and EDSA, as regulator and utility respectively, require electrical equipment connected to the grid to meet applicable safety standards; IEC 61851-based evidence would be expected for any EVSE approved for grid connection. Sierra Leone's tropical climate imposes specific derating requirements: average ambient temperature in Freetown ranges from 24–33 °C with high humidity (75–85% relative humidity year-round); during the dry season, ambient can reach 38–40 °C in inland areas. Outdoor chargers require IP55 minimum (IEC 60529) — higher than moderate-climate deployments — to withstand sustained tropical humidity, dust from harmattan winds, and driving rain during the wet season. IK08 or higher mechanical impact protection is recommended for public deployments given infrastructure security concerns.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）是国家标准机构，在没有特定塞拉利昂标准的情况下采用IEC出版物作为国家标准。对于电动汽车充电设备，IEC 61851-1（传导式电动汽车供电设备通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流电动汽车充电站）是适用的IEC基线。EWRC和EDSA作为监管机构和电力公司，分别要求并网电气设备符合适用安全标准；任何获批并网的EVSE均需提供基于IEC 61851的证据。塞拉利昂热带气候提出了特定的降额要求：弗里敦平均环境温度为24–33°C，常年相对湿度为75–85%；旱季内陆地区环境温度可达38–40°C。室外充电桩至少须满足IP55防护等级（IEC 60529）——高于温和气候地区部署要求——以承受持续的热带湿度、哈马丹风季扬尘和雨季强降雨。鉴于基础设施安全隐患，公共场所部署建议采用IK08或更高机械冲击防护等级。
summary.zht: 獅子山標準局（SLSB）是國家標準機構，在沒有特定獅子山標準的情況下採用IEC出版物作為國家標準。對於電動汽車充電設備，IEC 61851-1（傳導式電動汽車供電設備通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流電動汽車充電站）是適用的IEC基線。EWRC和EDSA作為監管機構和電力公司，分別要求併網電氣設備符合適用安全標準；任何獲批併網的EVSE均需提供基於IEC 61851的證據。獅子山熱帶氣候提出了特定的降額要求：弗里敦平均環境溫度為24–33°C，常年相對濕度為75–85%；旱季內陸地區環境溫度可達38–40°C。室外充電樁至少須滿足IP55防護等級（IEC 60529）——高於溫和氣候地區部署要求——以承受持續的熱帶濕度、哈馬丹風季揚塵和雨季強降雨。鑒於基礎設施安全隱患，公共場所部署建議採用IK08或更高機械衝擊防護等級。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP55 minimum for outdoor tropical deployment
SLSB (Sierra Leone Standards Bureau) — adopts IEC publications as national standards
EWRC (Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission) — safety and licensing requirements for electrical equipment

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. China domestic chargers are commonly certified to IP54 for outdoor use. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports for Sierra Leone SLSB or EWRC conformity assessment. China domestic chargers designed for a 220 V / 380 V stable-grid environment may not have been humidity-soaked, salt-mist, or harmattan-dust tested to Sierra Leone tropical field conditions.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。中国国内充电桩室外使用通常认证至IP54。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代SLSB或EWRC合格评定所需的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。为220 V / 380 V稳定电网环境设计的中国国内充电桩可能未经过适合塞拉利昂热带现场条件的浸湿、盐雾或哈马丹扬尘测试。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。中國國內充電樁室外使用通常認證至IP54。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代SLSB或EWRC合格評定所需的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。為220 V / 380 V穩定電網環境設計的中國國內充電樁可能未經過適合獅子山熱帶現場條件的浸濕、鹽霧或哈馬丹揚塵測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China IP54 outdoor charger enclosure baseline

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) IEC 61851-1 clause matrix and accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; (3) IP55 or higher / IK08 or higher enclosure test certificates appropriate for Sierra Leone tropical conditions (sustained humidity, driving rain, harmattan dust); (4) humidity-endurance and condensation test evidence per IEC 60068 (damp heat); (5) thermal derating evidence for Sierra Leone ambient temperatures and confirmation of de-rating at 35–40 °C high-humidity; (6) surge-protection device (SPD) evidence for Sierra Leone grid transient conditions; (7) installation instructions compatible with EWRC / EDSA requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report does not substitute for IEC 61851 accredited evidence. Sierra Leone IP54-only designs are likely to be insufficient for sustained tropical wet-season conditions; IP55 or IP66 is recommended.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵及ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；(2) 直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) 适合塞拉利昂热带条件（持续高湿度、强降雨、哈马丹扬尘）的IP55或更高 / IK08或更高防护等级测试证书；(4) 符合IEC 60068（湿热）的湿度耐久和冷凝测试证据；(5) 适配塞拉利昂环境温度及35–40°C高湿度降额确认的热降额证据；(6) 适应塞拉利昂电网瞬态条件的浪涌保护设备（SPD）证据；(7) 符合EWRC / EDSA要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告不能替代IEC 61851认可证据。仅满足IP54的设计可能不足以应对持续的热带雨季条件；建议采用IP55或IP66。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣及ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；(2) 直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) 適合獅子山熱帶條件（持續高濕度、強降雨、哈馬丹揚塵）的IP55或更高 / IK08或更高防護等級測試證書；(4) 符合IEC 60068（濕熱）的濕度耐久和冷凝測試證據；(5) 適配獅子山環境溫度及35–40°C高濕度降額確認的熱降額證據；(6) 適應獅子山電網瞬態條件的浪涌保護設備（SPD）證據；(7) 符合EWRC / EDSA要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告不能替代IEC 61851認可證據。僅滿足IP54的設計可能不足以應對持續的熱帶雨季條件；建議採用IP55或IP66。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in principle — SLSB adopts IEC standards and EWRC requires electrical equipment to meet applicable safety standards for grid connection; exact EVSE safety certification route should be confirmed with SLSB and EWRC for the specific product before deployment; IP55+ tropical enclosure protection is strongly recommended
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence for Sierra Leone without additional accredited testing; China domestic IP54 enclosure baseline is insufficient for Sierra Leone tropical field conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Sierra Leone-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP55 or higher enclosure certificates for the tropical environment, IEC 60068 damp-heat endurance, and a thermal review for Sierra Leone ambient conditions. Confirm the exact SLSB / EWRC conformity assessment route before deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向塞拉利昂的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适合热带环境的IP55或更高防护等级认证书、IEC 60068湿热耐久性测试，以及针对塞拉利昂环境条件的热环境审查。在部署前确认具体的SLSB / EWRC合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向獅子山的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適合熱帶環境的IP55或更高防護等級認證書、IEC 60068濕熱耐久性測試，以及針對獅子山環境條件的熱環境審查。在部署前確認具體的SLSB / EWRC合格評定路徑。
